channel.title: 2026-03-20 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-20 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Fluxonium as a Control Qubit for Bosonic Quantum Information
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Ke Nie, J. Nofear Bradford, Supriya Mandal, Aayam Bista, Wolfgang Pfaff, and Angela Kou
Author(s): Ke Nie, J. Nofear Bradford, Supriya Mandal, Aayam Bista, Wolfgang Pfaff, and Angela Kou Coupling a fluxonium control qubit to superconducting cavities suppresses detrimental inherited errors and nonlinearities, providing a robust alternative to transmon-based architectures for quantum computation. [PRX Quantum 7, 010357] Published Fri Mar 20, 2026
